content.query:
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE mycsvdata
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'https://laxmynicdatastorage.blob.core.windows.net/data'
)

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT csvformat
WITH
(
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS
    (
        FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
        FIRST_ROW = 2
    )
)

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE csvExtTable
(
    [Correlationid]    VARCHAR(200),
    [Operationname]    VARCHAR(300),
    [Status]           VARCHAR(100),
    [Eventcategory]    VARCHAR(100),
    [Level]            VARCHAR(100),
    [Time]             VARCHAR(100),
    [Subscription]     VARCHAR(200),
    [Eventinitiatedby] VARCHAR(1000),
    [Resourcetype]     VARCHAR(300),
    [Resourcegroup]    VARCHAR(1000),
    [Resource]         VARCHAR(2000)
)
WITH
(
    LOCATION = '/countries.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = mycsvdata,
    FILE_FORMAT = csvformat
) 

SELECT * FROM csvExtTable
